name: Suzanne Bonamici
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $302,305 for Suzanne Bonamici in U.S. House, OR-01. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
